podcasts.name: The Ecom Academy
podcasts.title: You can now create every single image & video inside Claude AI..
podcasts.transcript: You can now create every single image, every single video, every single influencer style ad to grow your business directly inside [music] of Claude AI. You can even create an avatar of yourself, and you don't need to have hyper-detailed [music] prompts or have a design degree. All of this can be set up for any business >> [music] >> in under 30 seconds. You see, Claude now allows AI apps to connect directly inside its own chat, which means all you need to do is >> [music] >> write what you want inside of Claude. It goes and looks for the right app, and it comes back, and it gives you exactly what you want. So, I put this to the test on my Shopify store, and I was able to build out everything [music] from end to end without even leaving Claude AI. So, in this video, I'm going to show you exactly how to set up Claude for your business, and I'm going to give you the exact instructions that you need to be able to generate all these creatives for your business. I'm going to show you how to create product images, AI influencer video, and then finally, I'm going to show you how to create a trending viral ad that [music] you can use to grow your business.
